allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Add enquiry processor MVP design spec *)
Bash(git -C "A:\\Strata-practical-exam" add package.json tsconfig.json tailwind.config.ts next.config.js styles/globals.css)
Bash(git -C "A:\\Strata-practical-exam" commit -m "chore: scaffold Next.js project with Tailwind and AI SDKs")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3002/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output $resp.StatusCode } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "OK: $\($resp.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "OK: $\($resp.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(try { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host $res.StatusCode } catch { Write-Host "Not ready: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
